plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Project Manager broker for cross-domain orchestration. Routes requests to specialized domain plugins, manages workflow changesets, tracks decisions/artifacts, resolves conflicts, and now includes /discover for skill finding, /tutorial for onboarding, /recipe for workflow templates, and /autonomy for action control.

plugins.name: user-experience
plugins.description: Design thinking and ideation team with 8 specialized agent personas and 9 skills for distinctive, memorable design direction. Includes aesthetic direction, typography curation, color alchemy, layout composition, texture/atmosphere, micro-delight design, and user research.

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Frontend implementation team with 15 specialized agent personas and 17 skills. Includes design systems, component architecture, motion design, accessibility, responsive engineering, performance, forms, navigation, data grids, data visualization, Storybook, Figma sync, and i18n internationalization.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Architecture team with 5 specialized agents for system design, design patterns, ADRs, technical diagrams, and API design.

plugins.name: backend
plugins.description: Backend team with 5 specialized agents for API development, database design, authentication, services, and integrations.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Testing team with 6 specialized agents for test strategy, unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, coverage analysis, and performance/load testing with k6 and Artillery.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: DevOps team with 5 specialized agents for CI/CD pipelines, deployment, infrastructure as code, monitoring, and containerization. Includes production safety hooks.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Data team with 5 specialized agents for data modeling, pipelines, analytics, warehousing, and governance.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security team with 5 specialized agents for audits, threat modeling, compliance, secrets management, and penetration testing guidance.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation team with 5 specialized agents for API docs, guides, architecture documentation, runbooks, onboarding, and now documentation localization.

plugins.name: dashboard
plugins.description: Real-time web dashboard for visualizing Claude Marketplace agents, skills, changesets, and cross-domain orchestration.

plugins.name: mobile
plugins.description: Mobile development team with 5 specialized agents for iOS (Swift/SwiftUI), Android (Kotlin/Compose), React Native, Flutter, and mobile testing.

plugins.name: mlops
plugins.description: MLOps team with 5 specialized agents for model training, deployment, feature engineering, experiment tracking, and ML monitoring.
